diagnosis: The level is a massive horizontal corridor (~5400px wide) with repetitive ladder-and-platform clusters and almost no elevation change — the player spends 45 seconds climbing the same 8-tile ladder pattern over and over, killing only one enemy, then quits at the first vertical shaft. The trace shows long flat runs at y=754 (ground) punctuated by identical climbs to y≈430, zero variation in jump archetype, and no mid-level checkpoints. The player's comment about 'enemies too easy' reflects the deeper issue: without spatial variety (gaps, multi-elevation platforms, ceilings, chokepoints), even added enemies become trivial target practice.
